--- Main Page ---
A Queens Tea Party Atlanta | Chic Tea Party Experiences
top of page
Atlanta's Premier tea party experience
Welcome to A Queen's Tea Party, where every event is more than a party—it's a purpose. We’re all about connecting women, sparking creativity, and making memories that last. Whether it’s a birthday, a Mommy & Me date, a bridal shower, or a product launch, we’re Atlanta’s go-to spot for chic celebrations.
BOOK NOW
GALLERY
​
​
Follow us on Instagram
#morethantea
@atlqueensteaparty
Load more
Delicious Tea Selection
Our selection of teas include flavored teas, herbal and black teas. We source our teas directly from origin and all blends are made by hand in Southern California.
Signature Drinks  & Mocktails
The Queen loves delicious pairing! You're sure to be delighted.
Private Event Catering
We know Queens can be selective and we offer several options for your private tea party or event! You may choose to BYOF (bring your own food) or select from one of our delicious menus!
Delectable Bakery Fresh Menu
Your palate will thank you! From local artisan cakes, cookies, scones, and much more!
For more information, visit our FAQs or Contact Us.

--- Page: /about-1 ---
About/FAQ | A Queens Tea Party
top of page
About Us
Our mission at The Queens Tea Party is a party with a purpose and the mission is connecting women to women ~ of all ages. While we love a tea party ~ we are focused on providing an experience which fosters unity, encourages ingenuity, and entertainment.
Our goal is to be place where a guest may celebrate her birthday, enjoy a Mommy & Me date, her best friend's bridal shower, her new product launch - we want to be the destination for her occasion.
Our goal simply - To be the most gorgeous, enjoyable café experience in Atlanta!
From our signature QTP tea blends and our Signature mocktails to our irresistibly chic and delicious treats - every single detail is photo perfection!
Our experience is solely meant to create that perfect memory – every time.
BOOK NOW
GALLERY
Frequently asked questions
Where are you located?
Our beautiful new address is:
The Lola
621 North Avenue NE D-100, Atlanta, GA 30308
​
We do offer public & private Tea Experiences by reservation.
If you desired date is unavailable; give us a ring (404-907-9660) we may have a cancelation.
I've never been to a Tea Party; what should I expect?
We are the prettiest perfect Tea Party experience!
Picture it....You have the cutest dress that's begging for a beautiful day or evening with your GIRLS!
Upon arrival for your you'll be greeted by your friendly host and a delicious welcome drink, the music makes you want to dance, but you're dressed so FAB you decide to indulge in a beautiful selfie!
While you're enjoying the ambiance, your host is prepping your tea party experience!
*the entire visit is timed, and it begins at your reservation time NOT arrival so we encourage you to be on time. Your party will be seated upon arrival, and the party will end depending upon selected tea party booking.
How do I reserve my Tea Party?
1. Visit our Book My Tea Party page
2. Click Book Now to reserve your desired time and date.
3. To add guests, visit Add Tea Party Guests + Experiences,
find your desired Tea Party and
enter the quantity of guests.
4. Be sure to enter name of guest hosting!
Are children welcome? Are there age requirements?
The Queen loves families!
You may visit during our cafe hours and if you are interested in a private Tea Party for your
little one - you may book your ticket
and
purchase a children's
ticket on the Add My Tea Party Guests+Experiences
page!
If you need assistance please visit our contact us page!
We offer special tea party sets for our younger guests!
Subscribe to Our Newsletter
